THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELI: I won't be manipulated that easily.
NEOW.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-AN: An outsider... a courier... the Spire... welcome...
I don't want to hurt anyone! But maybe I can go and see what's happening. Do you have any packages you want me to deliver?
Innocent... radiant... go... take... this blessing^
OROBAS.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-: A red courier! Greetings to you! Where are you from? What brings you here?
Another world! Amazing! Courier work! Very hard! Infected? I don't really understand!
Anyway, Orobas can help you! Whatever you need! Just ask! Just ask!
We meet again! Red courier! Any stories? Tell me more!
Angelina shares something she saw on one of her journeys.
So interesting! See you next time! Here, a gift!
DARV.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-AN: Welcome, lovely miss. Judging by your clothes, you're not from around here, are you?
Hello, I'm Angelina! I'm a courier!
So lively, wonderful... Are you going to see the Architect too? Then feel free to choose something from my collection!
Welcome, lovely miss! Is there anything I can do for you?
NONUPEIPE.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_M: You look exhausted, child. Come, sit and rest a while...
Oh, good child, are you also here to kill the Architect? Come, let me dress you up a little.
I'm a courier. I didn't come here to hurt anyone.

Of course, of course. Take this letter to the Architect. It will understand what I mean.
But before that, let me grant you my blessing...
Come, child, let me offer you a gift...
TANX.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-AN: Courier? Not a warrior! That staff is too weak! Fight me!!
(Angelina swings her staff, and reality particles begin to gather around her.)
Magic! A staff is a weapon too! Impressive! Take another weapon!
Come, show me your magic! Then take more weapons from me!
TEZCATARA.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_M: Oh, dear, I haven't seen you before. Who might you be?
I'm Angelina, a courier. I came to speak with the Architect and understand what's going on!
Such a lovely child. Would you like some sweets?
You're back, my lovely child. What can Tezcatara do for you?
VAKUU.talk.CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-A: Well, look who's here... oh, a new face.
Do not be afraid, my friend. Sign this contract, and you will gain unimaginable power.
Sorry, I'm not interested in that. And as a courier, your contract looks full of problems.
Tch, it's you. If you're looking for the Architect, pick one.
